title: Basil Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired dish made with chicken, basil, and a tangy curry sauce.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the tangy curry sauce and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the chopped basil and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
